com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.tools

Class ArrayBuilderConfig

  • Object
    • com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.tools.ArrayBuilderConfig

  • public class ArrayBuilderConfig
extends Object
    A collection of customizable parameters for a ArrayBuilder Object. Modifications of default parameter values can be done by adding corresponding options with values to the arguments or by calling the applicable setter method.
